reviews.review_description:
I'm really pleased I found this app and it works on my Oculus go even now in 2024. I particularly like the unguided sessions where you can choose a bell or gong sound.

Really useful for some mindfulness meditation in a good environment with subtle ambient sounds.
I had this on oculus go until it broke 😔 Can I transfer this to the quest 2 I recently bought?

Very nice environments with excellent image quality. Good addition allowing the scene to be rotated, but would be more useful if it was available during the scene as well with a swipe/button press. Also some subtle movement, such as moving clouds would enhance the reality ("Just Relax" app does this well). A few glitches where the left and right images don't match, which cause discomfort, but hopefully these will be cleaned up. Overall a great start and much better than a lot of non-3d, blurry relaxation apps on the store. Loving the updated option of turning the BONG off :) Also the new grassy environments are lovely!

developer_response.body: We are so glad to hear that you are enjoying Moment! Thank you for your review and we hope you keep checking in as we continue to add features and improve the experience. - Reality Mint Team

reviews.review_description: The app developers are very up front that this is an incomplete release which normally would bother me...but given the incredibly quality of the world the have created, the fact that the released it early to help people trapped inside to have a little bit of nature in their lives, and that this incomplete release is free, I am more than willing to give it 5 stars. I am looking forward to being perched on many new vistas in the future...but for now, it is enough to slip on my headset and slip into another world for a few minutes. Thank you for providing me with such a rich escape from my basement apartment.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Glad to hear you were able to escape for a bit! We will be adding more locations and features soon. - Reality Mint Team
